title: argyrochosma pallens
intro: Argyrochosma pallens, also known as silvery-rayed lip fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Argyrochosma pallens include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
